requiredEnv.name: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
requiredEnv.purpose: Authenticate Qwen Omni requests through the DashScope OpenAI-compatible API.

optionalEnv.name: DASHSCOPE_BASE_URL
optionalEnv.purpose: Override the DashScope OpenAI-compatible API base URL.

optionalEnv.name: QWEN_OMNI_MODEL
optionalEnv.purpose: Override the default Qwen Omni model used for video translation.

userProvidedUrls: public video URLs passed to video_to_ui_brief.py
public media URLs passed through wrapped wan27-video flows
notes: The repo scripts do not install packages or fetch code.
run_visual_loop.py invokes existing local Wan scripts and does not itself define extra network endpoints.

subprocesses.purpose: Reuse local Wan skills for image and video generation.

reads: .env files under the plugin and local Wan skill directories
